response: Start by reading nutrition labels to identify hidden sugars in your [food item]. Replace sugary snacks with whole fruits or vegetables like [fruit name]. Drink water or herbal tea instead of sodas and juices. Gradually reduce the amount of sugar you add to your coffee or cereal. Focus on eating more protein and fiber to stay full longer. Plan your meals ahead of time to avoid impulsive sugary choices. Track your progress in a journal or app to stay motivated.
